dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My world is a constant blur, a muted echo of what others see and hear. One eye, a glass orb. The other, clouded by fear.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Every morning, the same ritual. The cold porcelain of the sink. The careful placement.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) Another day. Another performance.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The floorboards groan under my weight, each sound a potential betrayal. He has ears everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Good morning, Jin. Sleep well?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His voice, smooth as polished stone. Always. Too smooth.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: Yes, Father.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) No. I never sleep well. Not in this house.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Pancakes today. Your favorite.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIZZLE

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) He knows my favorites. He knows everything. That's the problem.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The syrup drips, thick and sweet. A sickly sweetness that coats my throat.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: You're quiet this morning. Something on your mind?

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: No, Father. Just... thinking about school.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Good. Focus on your studies. You're a smart boy, Jin. You just need to... apply yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) Apply myself to what? To being your accomplice? Your witness?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHIRP (birds outside)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Outside, the world pretends to be normal. Inside, the air is thick with unspoken rules.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: School is no escape. Just another cage, with different bars.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Hey, one-eye! Still staring at nothing?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHOVE

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) Just ignore them. Don't cause trouble. Trouble always finds its way back home.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: What's wrong, mute? Can't even talk back?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I keep my head down, my gaze fixed on the cracked pavement. Invisible. That's the goal.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Evening. The house is quiet again. Too quiet.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DOOR CREAKS OPEN

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) He's back. I can feel it.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Jin? Are you home?

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: Yes, Father. In my room.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (slow, deliberate)

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: The news is reporting another missing person. A young woman, just like the others.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) My blood runs cold. He's talking about it. Right in front of me.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Such a shame. The world can be a dangerous place, can't it, Jin?

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: Yes, Father.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: But some dangers... are closer than you think.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP (a muffled sound from downstairs)

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) What was that? No, don't ask. Don't look. Don't know.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: I need you to do something for me, Jin.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) Here it comes. The request. The order. The complicity.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: There's a package in the basement. It needs to be... disposed of. Carefully.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My breath catches. A package. In the basement. I know what that means.

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: You know the drill, don't you, son? Don't leave any traces.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Seon
dialogue.line: (thought) My hands are shaking. My stomach churns. I'm a monster, just like him. A bastard.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DRIP (slow, rhythmic, from an unseen source)

dialogue.speaker: Dongsoo
dialogue.line: Good boy. You always were so good at following instructions.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The darkness of the basement calls. And I, the 'good boy,' have no choice but to answer.

summary: Jin Seon, a quiet high school student with a prosthetic eye, navigates his oppressive home life under his charming yet terrifying serial killer father, Dongsoo. After enduring bullying at school, Jin returns home only for his father to subtly reveal his latest crime and task Jin with disposing of the evidence, forcing him into unwilling complicity.
